ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, South, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The estimated population of the state */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* The number of registered voters in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "congressional_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congressional district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the district belongs to */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the congressional district */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Chamber of the district (e.g., Upper, Lower) */,
  "area" REAL /* The area of the congressional district in square miles */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The estimated population of the congressional district */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* The number of registered voters in the congressional district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* The type of congressional district (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the congressional district was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the congressional district was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congressional_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "redistricting_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redistricting plan */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the redistricting plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the redistricting plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* The status of the redistricting plan (e.g., proposed, approved, rejected) */,
  "plan_date" TEXT /* The date the redistricting plan was proposed or approved */,
  "plan_url" TEXT /* The URL of the redistricting plan document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the redistricting plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the redistricting plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* The type of demographic model (e.g., regression, machine learning) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the demographic model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the demographic model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the demographic model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the historical model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* The type of historical model (e.g., trending, econometric) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the historical model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the historical model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the historical model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the congressional district the prediction belongs to */,
  "demographic_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic model used for the prediction */,
  "historical_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical model used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Prediction value made by the models */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* The date the prediction was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_demographic_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_model_id") REFERENCES demographic_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_historical_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("historical_model_id") REFERENCES historical_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES congressional_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stances" (
  "stance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stance */,
  "stance_name" TEXT /* Name of the stance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stance */,
  "stance_category" TEXT /* The category of the stance (e.g., competitive, safe, leaning) */,
  "stance_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the stance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the stance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the stance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overlap_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overlap analysis */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the congressional district the analysis belongs to */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity the district overlaps with (e.g., county, municipality) */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity the district overlaps with (e.g., county name, municipality name) */,
  "overlap_value" REAL /* Value of the overlap between the district and the entity */,
  "overlap_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of overlap between the district and the entity */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* The date the overlap analysis was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the overlap analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the overlap analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overlap_analysis_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES congressional_districts ("district_id")
)
